tasks.label: Run logic_cpp
args: $debugExe = Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' 'build/Debug/logic_cpp.exe'; $releaseExe = Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' 'build/Release/logic_cpp.exe'; $singleConfigExe = Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' 'build/logic_cpp.exe'; if (Test-Path $debugExe) { & $debugExe } elseif (Test-Path $releaseExe) { & $releaseExe } elseif (Test-Path $singleConfigExe) { & $singleConfigExe } else { throw 'logic_cpp executable was not found under build.' }

$debugExe = Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' 'build/Debug/logic_cpp.exe'; $releaseExe = Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' 'build/Release/logic_cpp.exe'; $singleConfigExe = Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' 'build/logic_cpp.exe'; if (Test-Path $debugExe) { & $debugExe } elseif (Test-Path $releaseExe) { & $releaseExe } elseif (Test-Path $singleConfigExe) { & $singleConfigExe } else { throw 'logic_cpp executable was not found under build.' }
